nodes.label: MyPR Application
nodes.rationale: Workout tracking application for recording exercise series and personal records

nodes.label: Cloudflare D1 Database
nodes.rationale: SQLite-compatible edge database used for storing workout records; chosen for tight integration with Cloudflare Workers serverless platform

nodes.label: JWT Authentication
nodes.rationale: Used to authenticate API requests between frontend and backend; jwt_secret must be configured as a Worker secret variable

nodes.label: CORS Configuration
nodes.rationale: Must be updated when frontend domain changes to allow cross-origin requests; configured in src/index.ts via the cors middleware

nodes.label: Training Log Data (Exercise Series Records)
nodes.rationale: Database query result containing exercise, weight, reps, and date for each training session set

edges.rationale: Frontend communicates with backend via REST API; evidenced by CORS and JWT configuration sections

hyperedges.label: API Communication Between Frontend and Backend
